title: Add CLI `prompt planner` and `prompt executor --task <id>` commands
implementation_notes: Edit cli/relayhq.ts to add the `prompt` command with two sub-commands.
Reads docs/prompts/planner.md (resolve path relative to CLI file: import.meta.dir + '/../docs/prompts/planner.md')
Replaces {BASE_URL} with the resolved base URL (from --base-url or RELAYHQ_BASE_URL or default)
Prints the result to stdout (for piping to clipboard or pasting into system prompt field)
Appends a '## Current Task' section with task id, title, objective, acceptanceCriteria
If --task is not provided: prints executor.md without task section
If task not found: prints executor.md with '## Current Task\nTask {taskId} not found — run `relayhq tasks` to see available tasks'
Implementation note: Bun supports fs.readFileSync. Use import.meta.dir to get the directory of the CLI script, then navigate to docs/prompts/.
acceptance_criteria: `bun run ./cli/relayhq.ts prompt planner` prints planner.md with BASE_URL filled in.
`bun run ./cli/relayhq.ts prompt executor --task task-001` prints executor.md with task context appended.
`bun run ./cli/relayhq.ts prompt executor` (no --task) prints executor.md without task section, no error.
Output is clean text suitable for copy-paste into a system prompt.
No changes to existing command behaviour.
completion_summary: Added CLI `prompt planner` and `prompt executor [--task=<id>]` commands that render ready-to-paste system prompts with live base URL and bootstrap task context.
